title: tagetes arvensis
intro: Tagetes arvensis, also known as the strawflower or French marigold, is an annual herbaceous plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers and bitter, pungent foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tagetes arvensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and asthma. Tagetes arvensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
